evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.1 to 8.2 so I can react to manual field corrections. Here's my screen file: before-8.2-validation-flow.dart and pubspec_8.1.yaml.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to 8.2 in pubspec, switches the listener implementation from LabelCaptureValidationFlowListener to LabelCaptureValidationFlowExtendedListener, and adds didSubmitManualInputForField. didCaptureLabelWithFields is preserved.

evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.2 to 8.4. Here's my screen file: before-8.4-validation-flow.dart and pubspec_8.2.yaml. I want fine-grained progress feedback as the validation flow accumulates partial results.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to 8.4 in pubspec, adds didUpdateValidationFlowResult to the existing LabelCaptureValidationFlowExtendedListener implementation. Existing didCaptureLabelWithFields and didSubmitManualInputForField are preserved.
